summary: Six gaps identified: no WASM support (monolithic crate is root cause), no compile-speed engineering (incl. a panic=abort bug that breaks frb), testing refs conflict with new features-first philosophy (now codified in CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md), no publishing surface, no UI/UX skill wiring. Proposed layered 11-crate workspace solving WASM + compile speed + worktree concurrency + publishing simultaneously. Eight changes recommended (C-1..C-8); C-8 (philosophy docs) already done. Open questions: wasm inference stubbing, SurrealDB indxdb maturity, frb cross-crate mirrors.
